title: Run worktree squad retrospective
goal: Capture a Starfish retrospective with evidence-linked action items after a squad assignment or phase.

steps.text: Gather loop logs, verification outputs, and related assignment artifacts.
Draft retrospective using `worktree-squad-retrospective-template`, defaulting to the Starfish format, and record evidence-linked findings.
Convert improvements into concrete action items with owner and checkpoint.
Append one retrospective entry to `worktree-squad-retrospectives.jsonl` using `worktree-squad-loop-log-contract`.
Pause for AJ review before applying any non-trivial process changes from retrospective findings.
Apply approved follow-ups and update next-iteration queue.

acceptanceCriteria: Retrospective includes the Starfish buckets: Keep Doing, Less Of, More Of, Stop Doing, and Start Doing
Action items include owner and next checkpoint
Retrospective JSONL entry is appended with contract-compliant fields
No non-trivial process change is applied without AJ review

verification.text: Confirm retrospective sections are complete and evidence-linked
Confirm action items include owner and checkpoint
